title: Spermacoce oligodonta
taxonomy: Spermacoce oligodonta is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Spermacoce, which comprises a group of plants commonly known as beebread or false bee flowers. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, often referred to as the madder family or coffee family. Spermacoce oligodonta is native to tropical Africa and is known for its small, white flowers and hairy leaves. The plant's classification is further supported by its phylogenetic relationships within the Rubiaceae family.
